mapper.select: SELECT trade_date, total_amount, top_amount, total_stocks, top_stocks, CASE WHEN total_amount > 0 THEN ROUND(top_amount / total_amount * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS crowdedness FROM ( SELECT trade_date, SUM(amount) AS total_amount, SUM(CASE WHEN rn <= CEIL(cnt * 0.05) THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS top_amount, MAX(cnt) AS total_stocks, CEIL(MAX(cnt) * 0.05) AS top_stocks FROM ( SELECT trade_date, stock_code, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY trade_date ORDER BY amount DESC) AS rn, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY trade_date) AS cnt FROM stock_daily WHERE trade_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND is_deleted = 0 AND amount IS NOT NULL AND amount > 0 ) ranked GROUP BY trade_date ) agg ORDER BY trade_date
SELECT MAX(trade_date) FROM stock_daily WHERE is_deleted = 0
